lint.command: cd /Users/stefano/repos/open-marcus/backend-python && source venv/bin/activate && ruff check src/

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Specify exact cryptographic choices in Security Model section: PBKDF2-SHA256 with 480k iterations for key derivation, Fernet (AES-128-CBC + HMAC-SHA256) for symmetric encryption. Also document that change_password requires re-encryption of the database.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: privacy-encryption review (round 1) found AGENTS.md only says 'Master password -> argon2 -> database encryption key' but implementation uses PBKDF2 and Fernet. Also, change_password re-encryption requirement is not documented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guideline that all password-related features require integration tests that verify end-to-end behavior (e.g., password change test should verify old password fails and new password works).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-privacy-change-password review noted the new test would have caught the original bug if it existed during initial implementation. Having this as a convention would help prevent similar issues.
